text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Tuesday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Tuesday, May 06. You have design sync with Sarah at noon, and pediatrician checkup for Lily.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Reading scientific papers late tonight. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Understood. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Toddlers are full of energy. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: That is a common bottleneck. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: I can help with that. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Calculating some savings estimates. First United Mortgage offered 5.8% with zero points. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. Refinancing is a great leverage point. A rate of 5.8% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's good medical feedback. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. I checked the telemetry feeds. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Good focus area. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /appointment/notify under load. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I can help with that. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /appointment/notify. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. That's wonderful. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Calculating some savings estimates. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Took Lily to her medical checkup. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. I've logged your vitals. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
